issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as network failures or authentication errors.
The documentation contains verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.
Uses curl to download a binary from GitHub without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Incrementally archive a Pixiv artist's gallery using browser cookies and skip already-downloaded files
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines --cookies-from-browser firefox with --download-archive archive.sqlite3 and the documented pixiv directory/filename template ({id}_p{num:>02}.{extension}); baseline typically passes a username/password or omits the archive/dedup mechanism.

scenarios.name: Build an ML dataset of >=1920x1080 images from r/EarthPorn over the past year with JSON metadata sidecars
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented --filter "width >= 1920 and height >= 1080" expression, --download-archive, and the metadata postprocessor (mode: json); baseline relies on shell post-filtering or external scripts rather than gallery-dl's native filter and postprocessor.
